ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genome_assemblies" (
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genome assembly */,
  "accession" TEXT /* Accession number for the genome assembly */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version identifier for the genome assembly */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the genome assembly */,
  "genbank_accession" TEXT /* GenBank accession number */,
  "genbank_version" TEXT /* GenBank version number */,
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomy identifier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organism */,
  "refseq_category" TEXT /* RefSeq category */,
  "bioproject" TEXT /* BioProject identifier */,
  "biosample" TEXT /* BioSample identifier */,
  "wgs_master" TEXT /* Whole Genome Shotgun (WGS) master identifier */,
  "isolate" TEXT /* Isolate identifier */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Version status of the assembly */,
  "assembly_level" TEXT /* Assembly level (e.g., Scaffold, Contig) */,
  "release_type" TEXT /* Release type (e.g., Major, Minor) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the assembly */,
  "assembly_name" TEXT /* Assembly name */,
  "submitter" TEXT /* Submitter organization or individual */,
  "ftp_path" TEXT /* FTP path to the genome assembly files */,
  "superkingdom" TEXT /* Superkingdom classification */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum classification */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class classification */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order classification */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family classification */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus classification */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species classification */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain classification */,
  "stats" TEXT /* Additional statistics about the genome assembly */,
  "meta" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the genome assembly */,
  "biosample_id" INTEGER /* BioSample identifier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assembly was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assembly was last updated */,
  "worker_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the worker or process that created the entry */,
  "assembly_method" TEXT /* Method used for the genome assembly (e.g., de novo, reference-based) */,
  "sequencing_technology" TEXT /* Sequencing technology used (e.g., Illumina, PacBio) */,
  "annotation_method" TEXT /* Method used for annotation (e.g., Prokka, RAST) */,
  "qc_status" TEXT /* Quality control status (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "publications" TEXT /* List of publications associated with the assembly */,
  "project_pi" TEXT /* Principal Investigator of the project */,
  "project_funding" TEXT /* Funding source for the project */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the assembly is publicly accessible */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the data is released (e.g., CC0, CC-BY) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genome_assemblies_taxonomy_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxonomy_id") REFERENCES taxonomy ("taxonomy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genome_assemblies_release_type FOREIGN KEY ("release_type") REFERENCES release_types ("release_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genome_assemblies_bioproject FOREIGN KEY ("bioproject") REFERENCES bioprojects ("bioproject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genome_assemblies_assembly_level FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_level") REFERENCES assembly_levels ("assembly_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genome_assemblies_biosample FOREIGN KEY ("biosample") REFERENCES biosamples ("biosample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomy" (
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic classification */,
  "superkingdom" TEXT /* Superkingdom classification */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum classification */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class classification */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order classification */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family classification */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus classification */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species classification */,
  "parent_taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent taxonomy (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  "taxonomic_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the taxonomic classification (e.g., species, genus) */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the organism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxonomy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxonomy_parent_taxonomy_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_taxonomy_id") REFERENCES taxonomy ("taxonomy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bioprojects" (
  "bioproject_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each BioProject */,
  "bioproject_name" TEXT /* Name of the BioProject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the BioProject */,
  "pi_name" TEXT /* Name of the Principal Investigator */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bioproject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biosamples" (
  "biosample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BioSample */,
  "biosample_name" TEXT /* Name of the BioSample */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the BioSample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., environmental, clinical) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "collection_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for sample collection */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biosample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_levels" (
  "assembly_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly level */,
  "assembly_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assembly level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_types" (
  "release_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release type */,
  "release_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the release type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the release type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data curator, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or institution of the user */,
  "user_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "user_contact_info" TEXT /* Additional contact information (e.g., phone number, address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome assembly being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the assembly */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the assembly was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_access_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES genome_assemblies ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome assembly the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., FASTA, GFF) */,
  "file_md5" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the file for integrity checking */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., compressed, uncompressed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_files_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES genome_assemblies ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome assembly the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., annotation method) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "metadata_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was added or updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_metadata_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES genome_assemblies ("assembly_id")
)
